name: Shandong Longda Meat Foodstuff Co.,Ltd
summary: Shandong Longda Meat Foodstuff Co., Ltd. operates as a meat processing company in China. The company primarily engages in the pig breeding, slaughtering, and slicing activities. It also provides sauce and braised, low-temperature, smoked barbecue, and cured meat products; and cooked food products, smoked ham sausages, and quick-frozen foods. In addition, the company offers food safety testing services. It operates through approximately 3,000 meat chain stores. The company also exports its products to approximately 20 countries and regions, including Australia, New Zealand, Argentina, and Brazil. Shandong Longda Meat Foodstuff Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Laiyang City, China.
